prompt: Hey, can you write the results section of the paper based on our benchmark run? The stats are at /tmp/eval_data/stats.json. I need a draft LaTeX results section that I can paste into Overleaf. It should reference the tables and figures with \autoref{}.

assertions.description: A LaTeX file is created at paper/sections/results_draft.tex
The draft uses \autoref{} or \ref{} to reference tables/figures
The draft has at least one \subsection{} or structured sections
Key numbers from the stats appear in the narrative prose (e.g., 69.2% or 0.692)
Output includes reminder to git commit and push to Overleaf
